Manus 1.6 Lite
Lite
21:33
I have completed the presentation slides for your project on Real-Time QoE Monitoring in Mobile Networks.
The slide deck consists of 9 professionally designed pages using an asymmetric 12-column grid layout, bold typography, and a modern high-contrast color palette. I have integrated several data visualizations (bar charts, donut charts, and usage distribution) based on the requirement gathering survey and interview data you provided.
Key sections include:
  • Research Methodology: Detailing the dual-track approach.
  • Stakeholder Analysis: Deep dives into both Smartphone Users and Network Providers.
  • Data Insights: Visualizing the 82.8% slow internet issue and peak congestion patterns.
  • User Readiness: Showing the high 84.4% adoption willingness.
  • Design Constraints: Highlighting privacy and resource efficiency needs.
  • Conclusion: Presenting the refined problem statement and a 3-phase roadmap.
You can view the presentation via the attachment below. From the viewer, you can also export the slides to PDF or PPTX format as needed.
Bridging the Gap: Real-Time QoE Monitoring in Mobile Networks
